app.title: Meeting OS
app.subtitle: Turn company meetings into accountable execution.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Verify the service connections used by the product.
settings.checkPrompt: Run the connection test to verify the configured keys.
settings.connectionIssues: One or more services need attention.

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

dashboard.title: Turn every company meeting into clear tasks and decisions
dashboard.subtitle: This workspace does more than record and summarize. It extracts what needs to be done next: tasks, owners, deadlines, and execution follow-through.
dashboard.uploadFileHint: Supported formats include mp3, wav, m4a, mp4, and webm.
dashboard.quotaEmpty: Your monthly minute balance is exhausted. Recording is blocked until the next cycle.
dashboard.quotaEmptyDynamic: Your monthly {limit}-minute balance is exhausted. Recording is blocked until the next cycle.
dashboard.openTasksHint: Active work coming out of meetings.
dashboard.overdueTasksHint: Tasks that passed their due date.
dashboard.executionRateHint: Completed tasks out of all extracted tasks.
dashboard.tasksPanelDescription: Operational task list extracted from meetings and ready for follow-up.
dashboard.decisionsPanelDescription: Latest decisions captured from meetings, with ownership context when available.
dashboard.meetingsPanelDescription: Latest meetings feeding the execution pipeline.
dashboard.primaryCtaTitle: Start a meeting and turn it into execution
dashboard.primaryCtaDescription: Use live recording when you want tasks, decisions, responsibilities, and deadlines extracted automatically.
dashboard.primaryCta: Start a meeting and extract tasks
dashboard.primaryCtaHelper: Live recording is the primary path. Once the meeting ends, the system turns it into transcript, decisions, owners, and deadlines.
dashboard.secondaryCtaDescription: Upload an existing recording if the meeting already happened.

recording.summarizing: Generating transcript, summary, decisions, and tasks...
recording.speaker: Speaker {id}
recording.systemAudioOff: System audio is not available. Only microphone audio is being captured.
recording.remoteDescription: Share the meeting with system audio to capture remote participants.
recording.remoteDetail: Best for Zoom, Meet, Teams, or any online company meeting.
recording.micDescription: Use the microphone when you are physically inside the meeting room.
recording.micDetail: Best for in-person meetings around the same table.
recording.startingHelp: Approve the microphone or screen-share prompt to begin. If it stays stuck, cancel and try microphone only.
